subject: docs(sancio): pin rename to Vercel build/edge layer; add cron verification curls
body:
Tightening pass on the prior fix:

(1) Attribution: the catch-all key rename (slug → ...slug) does not come
from @vercel/node — that package only parses req.query from the URL it
receives. The rename is in Vercel's build/edge routing layer, which
rewrites incoming URLs onto the catch-all by appending a query string
whose key is the literal bracketed name from the filename. AI_MISTAKES
and the dispatcher header now name the correct subsystem; the lesson
("route from req.url, not req.query") is unchanged. Investigation
against @vercel/node's changelog and routing source did not pin the
rename to a specific commit, but the rename is observable end-to-end
via req.url, which is what the fix relies on.

(2) Cron verification: the cron endpoints (/api/sancio/cron/nudge,
/auto-expire) share the dispatcher and were also broken, but Vercel
only invokes them on schedule (08:00 / 09:00 UTC). USER_ACTIONS.md now
includes manual verification curls using CRON_SECRET so the user can
confirm cron routing without waiting for the next scheduled run. Both
handlers are idempotent (no-op on modules not yet stale/expired), so
running them outside the schedule is safe.

Tags: documentation, sancio, vercel, cron
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: sancio-api-stability
Semver: patch
